instNote: ﻿The hours of regular Divine Service are, in the Summer season, 6, 7, and 10 A.M., and 3 P.M. In the Winter season, 7, 8 and 10, A.M., and at 2 P.M. At each of the above hours, both morning and evening, there is always a Sermon. The last Mass is always a High Mass. Under the Cathedral there is a neat and spacious Chapel recently constructed exclusively for the Children, in which they assemble for Divine Service at 10, A.M. and at 3 P.M. The Mass celebrated for them is always a High Mass. They also have a discourse both in the forenoon and afternoon. The number of Children at the above hours, varies from 400 to 500. The Chapel is called St. Aloysius'.
﻿The hours of divine service are, in the summer at 10 A.M. and 3 P.M.; in winter at 10 A.M., and 2, P.M Sermon morning and evening
